Journal.Title: Neurological sciences : official journal of the Italian Neurological Society and of the Italian Society of Clinical Neurophysiology

Article.ArticleTitle: Effect of Tirzepatide on arrhythmic, major cardiovascular, and neurological outcomes in patients with type 2 diabetes: A systematic review and meta-analysis.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: School of Life Sciences and Biopharmaceuticals, Shenyang Pharmaceutical University, 103 Wenhua Road, Shenyang, Liaoning, 110016, People's Republic of China.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval: This meta-analysis was based on former studies and ethical approval was not required in this meta-analysis. Informed consent statement: Not applicable. Conflict of interest: The authors declare no conflict of interest.

Reference.Citation: Sun H, Saeedi P, Karuranga S, Pinkepank M, Ogurtsova K, Duncan BB et al (2022) IDF diabetes atlas: global, regional and country-level diabetes prevalence estimates for 2021 and projections for 2045. A consensus report by the American diabetes association (ADA) and the European association for the study of diabetes (EASD). Diabetes Care 45(11):2753–2786. https://doi.org/10.2337/dci22-0034
